MAXWARN_LIMIT_DESC: Number of warnings before action is taken
MAXWARN_ACTION_DESC: Which action should be executed when maximum warnings are reached?
DEFAULT_REASON_DESC: This reason will be automatically used for kicks/bans when no specific reason is provided.
SECTION_MODLOG_EVENTS_DESC: Choose which actions should be logged in the modlog channel
SECTION_DM_NOTIFICATIONS_DESC: Should the affected user be notified via direct message?

PROTECTED.TITLE: Protected Roles
PROTECTED.DESC: Members with a protected role cannot be punished by moderation commands (Warn, Kick, Ban, Timeout).
PROTECTED.EMPTY: No protected roles configured. All roles can be moderated.
PROTECTED.CONFIRM_REMOVE: Do you really want to remove this protected role?

CHANNEL_RULES.TITLE: Channel-specific Rules
CHANNEL_RULES.DESC: Define different moderation settings for individual channels. For example, set relaxed rules in meme channels or exempt channels from AutoMod.
CHANNEL_RULES.EMPTY: No channel-specific rules configured. Global settings apply.
CHANNEL_RULES.CONFIRM_REMOVE: Do you really want to remove this channel rule?

NOTES.TITLE: Moderator Notes
NOTES.DESC: Internal notes about users – only visible to moderators. Can contain background information or observations.
NOTES.HINT: Use the search above to find notes for a specific user, or click 'All' to load all notes.
NOTES.CONFIRM_DELETE: Do you really want to delete this note?

HELP.TITLE: Help & Tips
HELP.MODERATION_TEXT: Manage warnings, kicks, bans and timeouts for your server.
HELP.MODLOG_TEXT: Log all moderation actions in a dedicated channel.
HELP.PROTECTED_TEXT: Define roles whose members cannot be punished by moderation commands.
HELP.DM_TEXT: Automatically inform affected users about moderation actions via direct message.
HELP.CHANNEL_RULES_TEXT: Configure different moderation settings per channel, e.g. relaxed rules in meme channels.
HELP.NOTES_TEXT: Create internal notes about users that are only visible to moderators.
